requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) Approval for Listed Products
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST）列明产品批准
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST）列明產品批准

summary.en: Power adapters, battery chargers, and other listed electrical equipment must obtain approval from Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST, the Energy Commission of Malaysia) under the Electrical Supply Act 1990 before sale in Malaysia. Testing must be conducted to MS IEC standards (e.g., MS IEC 62368-1 for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment). ST approval is separate from and in addition to MCMC type approval. Devices supplied with a separately listed power adapter must ensure the adapter carries independent ST approval.
summary.zh: 电源适配器、电池充电器及其他列明电气产品须在马来西亚销售前依据1990年《电力供应法令》取得Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST，马来西亚能源委员会）批准。检测须依据MS IEC标准进行（例如，音视频、信息及通信技术设备适用MS IEC 62368-1）。ST批准与MCMC型式认可独立且须额外取得。随附单独列明电源适配器的设备须确保该适配器持有独立ST批准。
summary.zht: 電源適配器、電池充電器及其他列明電氣產品須在馬來西亞銷售前依據1990年《電力供應法令》取得Suruhanjaya Tenaga（ST，馬來西亞能源委員會）批准。測試須依據MS IEC標準進行（例如，音視頻、信息及通訊技術設備適用MS IEC 62368-1）。ST批准與MCMC型式認可獨立且須額外取得。隨附單獨列明電源適配器的裝置須確保該適配器持有獨立ST批准。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Regulations 1994 — Schedule of Listed Products
MS IEC 62368-1: Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements

summary.en: Electrical safety in China for IT and consumer electronics is covered under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) to GB 4943.1 (safety for IT equipment) administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies. CCC is mandatory for products on the CCC catalogue before sale in China. CCC is not recognised in Malaysia; ST approval requires independent re-testing to MS IEC standards.
summary.zh: 中国IT及消费电子产品的电气安全由CNCA指定认证机构依据GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全）实施CCC（中国强制认证）。CCC目录所列产品在中国销售前须强制取得CCC认证。CCC在马来西亚不被承认；ST批准须依据MS IEC标准独立重新检测。
summary.zht: 中國IT及消費電子產品的電氣安全由CNCA指定認證機構依據GB 4943.1（信息技術設備安全）實施CCC（中國強制認證）。CCC目錄所列產品在中國銷售前須強制取得CCC認證。CCC在馬來西亞不被承認；ST批准須依據MS IEC標準獨立重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Information Technology Equipment: Safety, Part 1: General Requirements
CCC administrative regulations — CNCA Order No. 117
GB 8898-2011 — Audio, Video and Similar Electronic Apparatus — Safety Requirements

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by ST Malaysia. CE Low Voltage Directive compliance and UL listings are also not accepted as substitutes. Power adapters and chargers supplied with wireless IoT devices must undergo independent ST approval testing to MS IEC 62368-1 (or the applicable MS IEC standard) at an ST-recognised laboratory before the product may be sold in Malaysia.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证不被ST马来西亚承认。CE低压指令合规证明及UL认证同样不被接受作为替代。随无线物联网设备提供的电源适配器和充电器须在ST认可实验室依据MS IEC 62368-1（或适用MS IEC标准）进行独立ST批准检测，方可在马来西亚销售产品。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證不被ST馬來西亞承認。CE低電壓指令合規證明及UL認證同樣不被接受作為替代。隨無線物聯網裝置提供的電源適配器和充電器須在ST認可實驗室依據MS IEC 62368-1（或適用MS IEC標準）進行獨立ST批准測試，方可在馬來西亞銷售產品。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety approval does not satisfy Malaysian ST requirements. Power adapters and chargers bundled with wireless IoT devices must obtain independent ST approval, with testing to MS IEC 62368-1, before importation or sale in Malaysia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全批准不满足马来西亚ST要求。随无线物联网设备捆绑的电源适配器和充电器须在马来西亚进口或销售前取得独立ST批准，并依据MS IEC 62368-1完成检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全批准不滿足馬來西亞ST要求。隨無線物聯網裝置捆綁的電源適配器和充電器須在馬來西亞進口或銷售前取得獨立ST批准，並依據MS IEC 62368-1完成測試。
